calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:54 am pausing at 10:02 am resuming at 10:18 am and concluding at 10:19 am

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau Inc. represented by Paul Eum. via zoom video conference.
Defendant High Point Construction Group Corp. not apearing.

BENJAMIN SEEMAN is sworn to testify on behalf of the Plaintiff and testifies.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Progressive Foundation, and against Defendant Chet Peeples, Chet W. Peeples, aka Chester Peeples, as follows:

1. Damages: $29,610.00
2. Prejudgment Interest: $5,076.86
3. Costs: $697.49
4. Attorney fees: $2,825.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $38,209.35
Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)
